proteoDA: Streamlined Differential Abundance Analysis of Proteomic Data

proteoDA-package.Rd

A package for the differential proteomics analysis with DIA data. To learn more, start with the tutorial vignette: browseVignettes(package = "proteoDA")

Author

Maintainer: Stephanie Byrum sbyrum@stjude.org

Other contributors:

  • Zuo-Fei Yuan zuo-fei.yuan@stjude.org [contributor]

Developed by Stephanie Byrum.
